Online banking /
Mobile banking app

Mobile banking app

All your money needs. One convenient app. 

No need for multiple apps to manage your finances. With the award-winning1 U.S. Bank Mobile App, you can track your spending, save toward your goals, and manage your money across all your accounts – even ones with other banks.

   

Or text GET APP to 872265 to receive a download link.

Manage your money, wherever you are.

Easy and safe banking that fits your lifestyle. See why more than a million users have given our mobile banking app for Android and iPhone five stars.

Get started by opening any U.S. Bank account today. Apply for a Bank Smartly® Checking account via the app in five minutes or less.

Learn more about the U.S. Bank Smartly Checking Account

Bank on the go.

Deposit checks.

Save the trip to the bank using the mobile app.

Pay using your digital wallet.

The mobile app lets you pay for purchases quickly and safely.

Conquer monthly bills.

Never miss a due date again. Schedule payments and stay on top of your recurring bills.

Put your savings on autopilot.

Use our smart transfer feature to automatically move money to your savings account based on your spending.

Transfer money.

Move money between U.S. Bank accounts or accounts at other banks.

Customize notifications.

Always know if your balance is getting low, if a bill is due and much more with push notifications.

Send & receive money.

Zelle®2 makes it fast, safe and easy to send and receive money. With more than 2,000 banks with mobile apps offering Zelle®, you'll be able to use it with people you know and trust, no matter where they bank. 

¿Hablas español? Nosotros también.

Operaciones bancarias con confianza en el idioma de tu preferencia. Simplemente abre el menú de la aplicación, selecciona, ajustes o configuraciones, y dirígete a Idioma para elegir inglés o español.

Plan. Track. Achieve.

With our new plan & track hub, you’ll gain access to personalized money management tools. From tracking your cash flow to monitoring your credit score, you’ll have the control and confidence to make every dollar work for you.

See all your money at a glance.

View balances, payments and other transactions across all your accounts – wherever you bank.

Spend smarter.

Manage your spending and get customized transaction and trend reports.

See how our spending tracker works

Save for your goals.

Set goals and create a plan to achieve them. We’ll help you get started and track your progress.

Explore our savings goal tracker

Stay on top of your credit.

Check, monitor and improve your credit health for free3 with the U.S. Bank Credit Score Program.

Keep your money secure.

Bank with confidence.

We offer the industry’s strongest available encryption and zero fraud liability.4

Learn about our digital security guarantee

Sign in with ease.

The U.S. Bank mobile app supports Touch/Face ID (iOS) and fingerprint/face scan (Android) for convenient and secure account access.

Lock or unlock your card.

Prevent unauthorized use with just a few taps.

Connect all your accounts.

When you link your external accounts, your login and account information is secured and safe.

Ask your Smart Assistant.

Our U.S. Bank Smart Assistant® is the quick and easy way to get banking done right from the mobile app. Quickly find answers to questions about your accounts, complete banking tasks in fewer steps, and get personalized money insights.

Learn more about Smart Assistant

Take the app for a spin.

We offer interactive demos of our mobile banking app and guide you through downloading the app and setting up an online account, if needed. Explore the app with no account or commitment required.

Mobile app demo Step-by-step guides

Ready to get started?

Manage your money on the go with the award-winning U.S. Bank Mobile app.

 

   

 

Or text GET APP to 872265 to receive a download link.

Frequently asked mobile banking app questions

Once you download the app to your Android or iPhone, you can easily enroll in online and mobile banking within the app. If you have already enrolled in online banking, just log in to the app with your username and password. Not yet a U.S. Bank customer? You can apply for an account with the app!

You can use Smart Assistant by typing or talking while using our banking mobile app. Smart Assistant listens when you speak and responds, just like a regular conversation. You can also type your question and you’ll receive a written response back.

To pay your bills on the U.S. Bank Mobile App, log in to your account and select Transfer & pay in the bottom navigation. Then, select Pay bills, choose the bill you want to pay and select Pay.

Mobile check deposit is one of the many convenient features of the U.S. Bank Mobile App. Simply log in to your account and use the camera on your phone to deposit checks to your U.S. Bank accounts.

With the U.S. Bank Mobile App, you can connect accounts from other financial institutions and get a full view of your money and spending using our Plan & track experience.

take the next step

Enroll in online banking
Log in
Mobile check deposit
Send money with Zelle
Start of disclosure content
Footnote
Return to content, Footnote

Disclosures

  1. Digital financial services benchmarking firm Keynova Group ranked U.S. Bank #1 for mobile banking apps in its Q3 2024 Mobile Banker Scorecard.

  2. To send money in minutes with Zelle®, both parties must have an eligible checking or savings account, and have a United States mobile number registered in your online and mobile banking profile for at least three calendar days. Transactions between enrolled customers typically occur in minutes.  

  3. Zero fraud liability – U.S. Bank provides zero fraud liability for unauthorized transactions. Cardholder must notify U.S. Bank promptly of any unauthorized use. Certain conditions and limitations may apply. See the Electronic Fund Transfers section in Your Deposit Account Agreement (PDF)  for details.

  4. Free credit score access, Alerts and Score Simulator through TransUnion’s CreditView™ Dashboard are available to U.S. Bank online and mobile banking customers only. Alerts require a TransUnion database match. It is possible that some enrolled members may not qualify for alert functionality. The free VantageScore® credit score from TransUnion® is for educational purposes only and is not used by U.S. Bank to make credit decisions.

Start of disclosure content

Zelle® and the Zelle® related marks are wholly owned by Early Warning Services, LLC and are used herein under license.

Equal Housing Lender

Deposit products are offered by U.S. Bank National Association. Member FDIC.
